title: HG Drain Odour Remover - Cleans & De-Odourises Kitchen & Bathroom Sinks, Drains, Toilets & Shower Trays - 0.5kg
features: HG Drain Odour Remover: Effectively cleans & de-odourises smelly kitchen or bathroom drains in just 30 minutes, leaving them smelling fresh again
For sinks, drains, toilets & shower trays: Drains can become smelly because of deposits on their walls. Fortunately this drain odour eliminator removes the deposits that cause the smell
Enough for 10 treatments: Safe for use in the home. Works fast, removes nasty niffs & lets the water flow freely again. Ideal for the bathroom, shower, utility & washbasin drains
Effective & easy to use: The self-acting smell remover formula does the hard work, so you don’t have to. No additional tools are required & sinks will be odour-free again
500ml HG Drain Odour Remover: Rinse the drain first with hot water. Add 50g (5 caps) of odour remover granules directly to the drain. Leave for 30 minutes & rinse thoroughly with hot water
description: Product Description HG Drain Odour Remover granules are a highly effective and easy to use way of deodorising smelly sinks and drains. The clever smell remover actively makes smelly drains and waste water pipes - in the sink, shower, bathroom, utility, kitchen and outside on the patio - a thing of the past. Banish nasty niffs in under 30 minutes with this fast-acting formula. Drains can become smelly because of deposits on their walls, which can start to build a repulsive odour over time. Fortunately, this drain odour eliminator directly removes the deposits that cause the smell from the sink or drain, ensuring the drains smell fresh again. The self-acting formula is easy to use and requires no additional tools. It cleans and deodorizes for 10 treatments in your home. With HG Drain Odour Remover smelly drains, pongy shower wastes and sink stinks are gone in a flash! Discover HG’s wide range of specialist cleaning products for your home, office and outside space. Includes: 1 x 500ml bottle of HG Drain Odour Remover granules How to use HG Drain Odour Remover: 1. Rinse the drain first with hot water. 2. Add 50g (5 caps) of HG drain odour remover granules directly to the drain. 3. Leave the drain deodorizer to work for 30 minutes. 4. Rinse thoroughly with hot water. If you spill any drain odour eliminator, remove it immediately with water. If the dishwasher is connected to the kitchen drain, do not use this product on that sink. Ingredients disodium carbonate, compound with hydrogen peroxide (2:3) sodium hydroxide, sodium carbonate, Terpineol, acetate, 2-tert-butylcyclohexyl acetate, p-mentha-1,4(8)-diene, 2-methylundecanal, [3R-(3α,3aβ,7β,8aα)]-2,3,4,7,8,8a-hexahydro-3,6,8,8-tetramethyl-1H-3a,7-methanoazulene, 3,7-dimethyloctan-1-ol cineole, 2,4-dimethylcyclohex-3-ene-1-carbaldehyde, pin-2(3)-ene, tridec-2-enenitrile, (R)-p-mentha-1,8-diene, coumarin, 3-methyl-4-(2,6,6-trimethyl-2-cyclohexen-1-yl)-3-buten-2-one, benzyl salicylate, citronellol, geraniol, linalool Directions 1. Rinse the drain with hot water first. 2. Put 50 g (5 caps) HG drain odour remover granules directly into the drain. 3. Leave the drain deodoriser to work for 30 minutes. 4. Rinse thoroughly with hot water. If you spill any drain odor killers, remove it immediately with water. If the dishwasher is connected to the kitchen drain, do not use this product on this sink. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. In case of contact, rinse immediately with plenty of water. Do not ingest. Use in a well-ventilated area. Wear protective gloves and clothing. Do not mix with other chemicals. Dispose of the product and container in accordance with local regulations. See more
